description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named pyudev CI that runs on push to master, on pull requests to master, and manually from the Actions tab. The workflow consists of two jobs: python-checks and development_environment_checks. The python-checks job uses a matrix strategy to test with Python 3.9.6, 3.6.8, and PyPy3, installing dependencies and running tests with make. The development_environment_checks job uses another matrix strategy to run various tasks like formatting, linting, and packaging in a Fedora 35 container.
